data.title: GitHub updates Copilot CLI with GPT-5 mini, GPT-4.1 models, and 4 specialized agents for code tasks.
data.description: GitHub has introduced two new models, GPT-5 mini and GPT-4.1, to its Copilot CLI tool, along with four specialized agents aimed at code review, planning, and automated testing. The addition of these models and agents is set to enhance the capabilities of developers using GitHub's platform. This update offers users access to improved AI technologies for their coding tasks.

data.title: Trump supports Credit Card Competition Act to break Visa and Mastercard near-duopoly. Shares of Visa dropped 4.5%, Mastercard 3.8%. They hold 84% of the market, drive $223B in annual revenue. Swipe fees at 2.35%. Trump also calls for 10% interest rate cap. Goldman sees risk to Visa and Mastercard.
data.description: President Trump supports the Credit Card Competition Act, requiring large banks to allow credit card transactions through at least two unaffiliated networks, challenging Visa and Mastercard's near-duopoly. Visa and Mastercard stocks dropped 4.5% and 3.8%, the largest decrease in six months. The two companies currently dominate 84% of the U.S. credit card market, making $223 billion annually. The Act aims to lower swipe fees, which were at 2.35% per transaction in 2024. Trump also suggested capping credit card interest rates at 10% for a year. Goldman Sachs sees risks for Visa and Mastercard from this legislation.

data.title: Dr. Jonathan Wiles named CEO of Living Water International, Dr. Mike Mantel as President. - PRNewswire, Jan. 14, 2026.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, in Houston, it was reported that Living Water International, a Christian non-profit organization focusing on sustainable water, sanitation, and hygiene solutions, appointed Dr. Jonathan Wiles as Chief. This organization collaborates with local churches and communities to implement WASH solutions.

data.title: USPS to release Year of the Horse stamp for Lunar New Year on Feb. 17, 2026, First-day-of-issue event in Houston.
data.description: In observation of the Lunar New Year, the U.S. Postal Service will commemorate the Year of the Horse by unveiling a new stamp. This zodiac cycle will commence on February 17, 2026, and conclude on February 5, 2027. The debut event for the Forever stamp is scheduled to take place in Houston.

data.title: Training course on Post Market Surveillance & Complaint Handling Systems for Medical Devices added to ResearchAndMarkets.com. Topics include FDA CGMP expectations & requirements. Date: Jan 22 - Jan 23, 2026.
data.description: Dublin - A new training course on "Medical Devices: Developing Effective Post Market Surveillance and Complaint Handling Systems" is now available from ResearchAndMarkets.com. Scheduled to take place from January 22nd to January 23rd, 2026, this course will address U.S. FDA Current Good Manufacturing Practice (CGMP) expectations and requirements for Post Market Surveillance and Complaint Handling. The seminar will cover Section 522 of the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act (FD&C Act) and relevant articles/Annexes of the EU's Medical Device Regulation. Participants can learn about key strategies and regulations concerning post-market activities to ensure compliance and product safety.

data.title: VCI Global partners with Mezzofy for enterprise asset supply, tapping into network with $8 billion voucher transactions.
data.description: Transitioning from the launch of the RWA Exchange to onboarding enterprise assets, marks a significant development. This shift leverages Mezzofy's established platform, which has facilitated over US$8 billion in voucher transactions.

data.title: USRA appoints Dr. Brandon Thorne as  Senior VP, Energy Programs effective January 12, 2026, emphasizing strategic focus.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, the Universities Space Research Association (USRA) revealed the selection of Dr. Brandon Thorne as the new Senior Vice President for Energy Programs. Starting his role on January 12, 2026, Dr. Thorne's appointment underscores USRA's commitment to Energy Programs and showcases their strategic priorities moving forward.

data.title: Zack Kass to headline ATD 2026 conference as keynote speaker in Alexandria, Va. - Jan. 14th. (Numbers: ATD 2026 conference, Jan 14, 2026)
data.description: Zack Kass, an AI strategist and executive business advisor, is scheduled to address talent development professionals at the largest global gathering in Alexandria, Virginia. The keynote speech will take place on Monday morning and is part of the Association for Talent Development's 2026 event.
